case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR VS. REMEDIOS VILLACORTA CLOMERA

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-08-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF, NO SERVICE. DEFENDANT'S EX-HUSBAND APPROACHED THE CLERK AFTER THE PLAINTIFF LEFT THE COURTROOM TO REQUEST A CONTINUANCE, ADVISED DEFENDANT THAT PLAINTIFF REQUESTED THAT CASE BE TAKEN OFF OF CALENDAR. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,076.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT CLOMERA, REMEDIOS VILLACORTA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-08-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
